title: VGate Orchestrator
description: Unified control plane for agent lifecycle management, identity issuance, and policy enforcement

items.name: Agent Registration & Identity
items.description: Register agents with Ed25519 key pairs and issue NATS Nkey/JWT identities with scoped permissions

items.name: Policy Management
items.description: Define and enforce fine-grained access control policies for agent communication and resource access

items.name: Network Monitoring
items.description: Real-time monitoring of agent activity, message throughput, and network health

items.name: REST & NATS API
items.description: Programmatic access to all VGate functionality via RESTful endpoints and NATS subjects

title: Agent SOUL Protocol
description: Sovereign On-chain Universal Ledger — the foundational identity primitive for autonomous agents

items.name: Identity Creation
items.description: Generate cryptographically verifiable agent identities with Ed25519 key pairs and NATS Nkey format

items.name: Authorization Scopes
items.description: Define granular authorization scopes for each agent, controlling what actions they can perform

items.name: Identity Verification
items.description: Verify agent identities through cryptographic signature verification and JWT validation

title: One-Click Agent Templates
description: Pre-built agent deployments with fully configured infrastructure

items.name: Identity Agent
items.description: Deploy an agent that handles identity verification, credential issuance, and trust scoring

items.name: Settlement Agent
items.description: Deploy an agent that manages TigerBeetle transfers and settlement workflows

items.name: Bridge Agent
items.description: Deploy an agent that bridges between NATS subjects and external systems via webhooks
